summary_one_line: Reach a font/script setup whose computed script enum equals HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR's switch case, found by CMP_MAP gradient without I2S corpus dilution.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input that drives plan->props.script through the use-shaper data path so the script enum lands on the HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR switch-case at line 32 (true side, return true), rather than the MONGOLIAN/NKO/default arms the loser reaches; the controlling value is the script enum derived from parsed font/table bytes, not a literal that can be substituted directly into a CMP.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile reaches the true side in all 10 trials with hitcount 26 on the branch; its CMP_MAP gradient feedback rewards inputs whose CMP operands move closer to a matching script tag, walking the corpus toward OLD_UYGHUR without an I2S stage diverting energy.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog resolves only 1/10 and is blocked 9/10 at avg 22h, hitting MONGOLIAN/NKO/default instead; its added I2SRandReplace mutator spends mutation energy on direct operand substitution that cannot reach a script enum computed indirectly from font tables, diluting the corpus and starving the CMP_MAP gradient that actually works.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner is enabled by the CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance bucket feedback) shared by both fuzzers; the loser's only extra technique is the I2S substitution mutator, and since this delta is the sole difference, adding it hurts here — it pollutes/dilutes the corpus and energy budget rather than helping reach an indirectly-computed switch value, so the operative winning technique is the CMP_MAP gradient running undiluted in value_profile.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is a switch-case arm on a script enum (HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR), reached only when the computed script equals that case.
The switched value is plan->props.script, computed upstream and passed into has_arabic_joining, not a raw input literal.
The decisive pair is value_profile beating value_profile_cmplog with the I2S technique as the single delta.
The winner value_profile resolves all trials and hits the branch (hitcount 26); the loser is blocked 9/10 for ~22h.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
avg duration blocked: winner=0.70h  loser=22.00h
  avg hitcount on branch: winner=26  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The loser reaches the sister switch arms (MONGOLIAN) and the default instead of OLD_UYGHUR.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L  32  T=10 F=0  T=0 F=10  case HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR:  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile's enabling technique is the CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient feedback that preserves inputs whose CMP operands get closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: The winner value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator; the loser value_profile_cmplog adds it as its sole extra technique.
value_profile_cmplog's only added mutator over value_profile is I2SRandReplace, isolating the delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is 'CMP_MAP gradient', not I2SRandReplace, so lineage dash-row verification is not mandatory. This is an inverted pair: value_profile (CMP_MAP gradient, no I2S) BEATS value_profile_cmplog (CMP_MAP gradient + I2S). The winning technique is the CMP_MAP gradient shared by both, running undiluted in the winner; the loser's extra I2SRandReplace is the harmful delta, so an I2S floor row in the loser would corroborate the harm, not the winner's mechanism.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with this indirectly-computed switch-on-script-enum gate in which value_profile_cmplog reaches the OLD_UYGHUR true side at least as fast as value_profile across trials, showing I2S does not dilute and the CMP_MAP gradient alone is not the decisive advantage.

weakest_evidence_point: The corpus-dilution/energy-starvation explanation for why adding I2S hurts is inferred from the technique delta and blocked-time gap, not directly observed in seed lineage at this branch.
